title: How the system works - Canada.ca
content:
## How the system works
You can hire skilled foreign workers through Express Entry when you can’t find Canadians or permanent residents to fill jobs.

## Access Express Entry’s pool of candidates
Express Entry is a system used to manage applications for:
- the Federal Skilled Worker Program
- the Federal
      Skilled Trades Program
- the Canadian Experience Class
- a portion of the Provincial
      Nominee Program
To hire a skilled worker or tradesperson, you can access candidates through:
- the same recruiting and hiring practices you use now When you find someone you want to hire, they must create an Express Entry profile.
- When you find someone you want to hire, they must create an Express Entry profile.
- private sector job boards
- the Provincial Nominee Program
- the Job Match service of Canada’s Job Bank, which connects eligible employers with Express Entry candidates
If you have questions, our outreach officers , located across Canada, can explain:
- how Express Entry works
- how you can support an employee’s application through Express Entry with a valid job offer
Learn about services available for employers.
Use the employer’s roadmap to plan your hiring strategy.
